positive: A stylized and vibrant illustration featuring symmetrical celestial flora. The central subject is an arrangement of glowing, bioluminescent mushrooms and stylized crescent moons intertwined with delicate, swirling vine motifs. Use a deep indigo and rich emerald green color palette, accented by pops of soft gold and vibrant magenta. The style should be neo-traditional tattoo art meets detailed botanical illustration, emphasizing clean, thick outlines and stark contrast against a dark, cosmic background. The composition must be perfectly centered and isolated on a solid, seamless background, suitable for immediate printing on apparel. Highly detailed linework, vector quality, deep depth of field, elegant, mysterious, whimsical.
negative: ugly, tiling, out of frame, poorly drawn, bad anatomy, extra limbs, mutated, blurry, noisy, low resolution, signature, watermark, text, graffiti, logo, cropped, disfigured, grayscale, monotone, sketch, realistic photo, low contrast, grain
